title: 有馬記念の後に・その姿は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon wins the Arima Kinen! Narita Brian
has also shown everyone the full extent of her
drive, and the whole venue is roaring over the
performances from both the Queen of the
Amazons and the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon relishes in her victory while Narita
Brian congratulates her. She lets out a joyous yell
at the conclusion of their one-on-one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, Narita Brian says that Hishi
Amazon has a passion in her that makes her want
to keep on going. The two acknowledge each
other's abilities and vow to compete again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll win any one-on-one that comes her way!
That's the kind of burning passion Hishi Amazon
harbors within her.
